questions.question: Define object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and explain its importance in programming, with a focus on how it relates to C++ classes.
questions.hint: Focus on the key principles of OOP and how they are implemented in C++

questions.question: What is the main difference between a class and an object in C++? Provide an example of a class and an object, and explain the role of each in a C++ program.
questions.hint: Focus on the differences in creation and usage

questions.question: A C++ class has several members. Explain and provide an example of the following: member variables, member functions, constructors, and destructors. How do these elements relate to the overall structure of a C++ class?
questions.hint: Focus on the role of each element in a C++ class
